proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=97, 93.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +42.5pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8690 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
R-multiple 0.61 driven by Day-6 forced-exit dominance (D-8 review pending per project_anchor §7); if D-8 resolves upward, cohort may qualify for Tier S upgrade on next archive comparison
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=97, wr=93.7%, edge +42.5pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=97, Wilson lower 0.869, +42.5pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61 below the Tier S threshold. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 4), so the cohort is dormant and current Bear exposure is only 11/61 (18%) with no concentration trigger active (0.6393 below 0.80). Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-07-10) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: BULL_PROXY × Bear: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=BULL_PROXY, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +29.9pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.98 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
R-multiple 0.98 remains under D-8 review; forced-exit dominance on Day-6 could depress realized R when Bear regime re-emerges and the boost activates
approval would propagate redundant to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +29.9pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +29.9pp edge over BULL_PROXY baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.98 (<1.0). Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 4), so the cohort is dormant; portfolio Bear exposure is 11/61 (18.0%) and no regime concentration is triggered (0.6393 below 0.80), so promotion does not compound concentration risk and may diversify when Bear re-emerges. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-06-19 through 07-10) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_signal_type = UP_TRI (88.5%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_signal_type = UP_TRI; recommended action: Pause new UP_TRI entries until signal-type share drops below 85% via natural Day-6 exits; if adding, restrict to DOWN_TRI or non-directional signals to rebalance the book
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: If Choppy regime breaks to a sharp Bear leg, the 95% directional-long book on an unvalidated Candidate-tier cohort takes correlated drawdown across all 54 UP_TRI positions simultaneously with no offsetting shorts

evidence: Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort at Candidate tier only (n=294) — edge unvalidated
Choppy regime at 63.93% adds regime tilt without triggering the 0.80 threshold
Top cell UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank at 11.48% (within 0.20 cell tolerance)
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new UP_TRI entries until signal-type share drops below 85% via natural Day-6 exits; if adding, restrict to DOWN_TRI or non-directional signals to rebalance the book
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: If Choppy regime breaks to a sharp Bear leg, the 95% directional-long book on an unvalidated Candidate-tier cohort takes correlated drawdown across all 54 UP_TRI positions simultaneously with no offsetting shorts
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: UP_TRI dominates the signal mix at 54/61 = 88.5% (above the 0.85 threshold), making the book a near-monoculture directional long. The matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort for the concentrated cell sits only at Candidate tier (n=294) — unvalidated edge. Regime concentration (Choppy 63.93%) and the top cell (UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank at 11.48%) are within their respective thresholds, but the signal-type monoculture on an unvalidated cohort combined with 39/61 = 63.9% Choppy exposure is the actionable risk.
